ch10_start.text: Half the lights are dead. Crew deck bulkheads buckle. Sector B has been a drowned grave since the flood — and now the upper crew berths are tearing open too.

ch10_crew_quarters.text: Tendrils tear bulkheads like foil. Over the PA, the dead recite station schematics in perfect chorus — Miller, drill techs, even Victor's dry academic cadence.

ch10_revelation.text: It is not mocking you. It is learning door codes. The organism absorbs memory. Every person it takes becomes a better predator.

ch10_survivors.text: Otto is pinned under a beam. Chloe is cornered by a mass of tendrils. You only have time for one before this sector folds.

choices.text: Otto is already in the brig — try to save Chloe.

ch10_save_otto.text: You haul the beam free. Otto gasps thanks as you sprint for the maintenance airlock. Behind you, Chloe's scream cuts off into a wet silence.

ch10_save_chloe.text: You pull Chloe free. You both run. Otto's shout follows you until the sludge takes the sound apart.

ch10_end.text: The airlock seals. Main reactor trips offline to avoid meltdown. Darkness is total — except for the glow under your skin.

textVariants.text: The airlock seals. Reactor offline. In the dark, the glow under your skin is bright enough to read by. Something smiles with your mouth and you almost smile back.
